variables.input: smartscapeNodes K8S_CLUSTER | fields k8s.cluster.name | sort k8s.cluster.name asc
smartscapeNodes K8S_NAMESPACE | fields k8s.namespace.name | dedup k8s.namespace.name | sort k8s.namespace.name asc

0.content:
![Dollar General](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/75/Dollar_General_logo.svg/200px-Dollar_General_logo.svg.png)
# Kubernetes SRE Dashboard
Real-time observability for Dollar General Kubernetes infrastructure

2.title: Total Nodes
2.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NODE | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | summarize node_count = count()

3.title: Total Pods
3.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | summarize pod_count = count()

4.title: Container Restarts
4.query: timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | fieldsAdd total = arraySum(restarts) | summarize total_restarts = sum(total)

5.title: OOM Kills
5.query: timeseries oom = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.oom_kills), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | fieldsAdd total = arraySum(oom) | summarize total_oom_kills = sum(total)

7.title: CPU Usage by Cluster
7.query: timeseries cpu = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter))

8.title: Memory Usage by Cluster
8.query: timeseries mem = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.memory_working_set), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter))

10.title: Container Restarts by Cluster
10.query: timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter))

11.title: OOM Kills by Cluster
11.query: timeseries oom = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.oom_kills), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter))

13.title: Degraded Deployments (Ready < Desired)
13.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_DEPLOYMENT | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | fieldsAdd desired = config[`spec`][`replicas`], ready = config[`status`][`readyReplicas`], available = config[`status`][`availableReplicas`] | filter isNotNull(desired) and desired > 0 and (isNull(ready) or ready < desired) | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.workload.name, desired, ready, available | sort k8s.cluster.name asc

14.title: Stuck Rollouts (ProgressDeadlineExceeded)
14.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_DEPLOYMENT | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | expand condition = config[`status`][`conditions`] | fieldsAdd cond_type = condition[`type`], cond_reason = condition[`reason`], cond_message = condition[`message`] | filter cond_type == "Progressing" and cond_reason == "ProgressDeadlineExceeded" | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.workload.name, cond_message

16.title: Pods Not Running
16.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | fieldsAdd phase = config[`status`][`phase`] | filter phase != "Running" and phase != "Succeeded" | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase | sort k8s.cluster.name asc

17.title: Top Restarting Pods
17.query: timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by: {k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | fieldsAdd total_restarts = arraySum(restarts) | filter total_restarts > 0 | sort total_restarts desc | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, total_restarts | limit 20

19.title: Unhealthy Nodes
19.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NODE | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | parse k8s.object, "JSON:config" | expand condition = config[`status`][`conditions`] | fieldsAdd cond_type = condition[`type`], cond_status = condition[`status`], message = condition[`message`] | filter (cond_type == "Ready" and cond_status != "True") or (in(cond_type, array("MemoryPressure","DiskPressure","PIDPressure")) and cond_status == "True") | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, cond_type, cond_status, message

20.title: Node Count by Cluster
20.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NODE | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | summarize node_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort node_count desc

22.title: CPU Throttled Containers (>25%)
22.query: timeseries { throttled = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_throttled), limit_cpu = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.limits_cpu), usage = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage) }, by: {k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | fieldsAdd throttle_pct = if(arrayAvg(limit_cpu) > 0, (arrayAvg(throttled) / arrayAvg(limit_cpu)) * 100, else: 0) | filter throttle_pct > 25 | sort throttle_pct desc | fields k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, throttle_pct | limit 20

23.title: CPU Throttling Trend
23.query: timeseries throttled = avg(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_throttled), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter))

25.title: Error Logs by Namespace
25.query: fetch logs | filter isNotNull(k8s.namespace.name) and loglevel == "ERROR" | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) and in(k8s.namespace.name, array($NamespaceFilter)) | summarize error_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name} | sort error_count desc | limit 20

26.title: K8s Error Log Trend
26.query: fetch logs | filter isNotNull(k8s.namespace.name) and loglevel == "ERROR" | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | makeTimeseries error_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name}

28.title: Pods by Cluster
28.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | summarize pod_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort pod_count desc

29.title: Workloads by Type
29.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_DEPLOYMENT, K8S_STATEFULSET, K8S_DAEMONSET | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | summarize count(), by: {k8s.workload.kind} | sort `count()` desc

30.title: Namespaces per Cluster
30.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_NAMESPACE | filter in(k8s.cluster.name, array($ClusterFilter)) | summarize ns_count = count(), by: {k8s.cluster.name} | sort ns_count desc
